name: rust-assembly-line
description: A Rust-focused software assembly line that orchestrates multi-agent workflows to prepare Architecture Decision Records (ADRs), plan implementation stories, enforce code quality, and capture learnings — all tuned for Rust workspace projects.
author: adversarial.systems
features: Architecture Decision Records (ADR) authoring and validation
Multi-agent code review with 14 specialized reviewers
Event Sourcing scaffolding with Fold→Decide→Evolve pattern
CRUD scaffolding across Rust crate layers
OpenAPI schema management with Scalar UI
Linear issue generation with dependency tracking
Rust quality standards enforcement (no unwrap, typed errors, 100% coverage)
